description_long: This is a dark-colored, tracked combat vehicle with a prominent, elongated cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features a low, angular hull with reinforced armor plating covering the entire body, including the turret and sides. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain, and are encased in protective side skirts. The turret is equipped with a single large-caliber cannon, and there are visible hatches and periscopes on the top for crew access and visibility. The surface finish is matte, with no visible camouflage pattern or military markings. The overall design suggests a focus on durability, firepower, and protection.
description: A dark, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon and robust side skirts, finished in a matte color.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the turret, and the detailed tracks with side skirts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stance, thick frontal armor, and the cannon pointing directly forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and tracks, mirroring the features of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, rear armor, and the tracks extending behind the vehicle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large-caliber cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with apparent thick, angular panels covering the hull and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
